meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't validate ideas (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't validate ideas. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Validate SaaS Ideas Fast for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop guessing. Use the Antigravity project template to validate SaaS ideas in hours, not weeks. A high-impact, intermediate guide for professional freelancers.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates the 'validation gap' by scaffolding production-ready prototypes that integrate directly with Claude Code. By automating the boilerplate of database setup, authentication, and UI routing, you can ship a functional, user-testable MVP in under two hours, ensuring you only build what clients actually pay for.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: a client pitches a 'game-changing' feature, you spend three days architecting the backend, and then the idea dies because nobody actually wants it. The cycle of building in the dark is the fastest way to burn out and lose revenue. Your technical expertise is being wasted on dead-end projects that never see the light of production.

It’s time to stop coding and start validating. The Antigravity project template acts as your high-velocity launchpad, forcing you to decouple core business logic from tedious setup. By leveraging the synthesis of Antigravity’s structural rigor and Claude Code’s autonomous execution, you transform from a manual coder into a rapid-fire product strategist.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish the foundational architecture. This step ensures your project has the correct environment variables and directory structure pre-configured for rapid iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity standard stack with authentication, Stripe billing, and PostgreSQL integration enabled.

steps.title: Define the Validation Schema
steps.description: Map your client's business logic to a database schema. Focus only on the data points required to prove the core value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the Prisma schema for a MVP that tracks user engagement metrics and core value capture points. Keep it lean.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'update prisma/schema.prisma to support user engagement tracking'

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the API endpoints based on your schema, ensuring type-safety and consistency across the stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create TRPC endpoints for the CRUD operations defined in the schema. Ensure they are protected by Auth0-ready middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'generate trpc routers for all defined models'

steps.title: Inject UI Components
steps.description: Use Antigravity's component library to build the user-facing interface, focusing on high-conversion landing page elements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard component that displays the engagement metrics from the database using Shadcn UI.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'create dashboard component using shadcn/ui to display engagement data'

steps.title: Stress Test and Deploy
steps.description: Deploy to a preview environment to validate the idea with real user traffic before committing to full-scale development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the test suite and configure the deployment script for Vercel integration.

pro_tips: Always use the 'dry-run' flag in Claude Code to review proposed file changes before they overwrite your architecture.
Treat your Antigravity template as a living product; commit your own custom UI components back into your fork for future projects.
Focus on 'feature flags' early to enable or disable product modules based on user feedback without redeploying the entire stack.
Integrate a lightweight analytics SDK into the template from minute one to track user behavior during your validation phase.
Use Claude Code to document your API endpoints automatically as you build to save hours of manual technical writing.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, share the link with three target users. Use the feedback to iterate the schema using the same Antigravity prompt workflow. If the conversion metrics hit your target, proceed to full-scale feature development.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the trash bin. Master the workflow that turns hours of coding into months of saved work. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
